voice.tone: Precise and trustworthy. Speaks to investors and financial planners.
voice.errors: Clear and specific. Include error codes where applicable. For data sync failures, show last-known-good timestamp.
voice.loading: Skeleton rows in tables and chart outlines. Show stale data with a subtle 'Updating...' badge rather than blank screens.
voice.empty_states: Matter-of-fact. Explain what data will appear and how to configure the data source. No playful language.
